data.content: Integrated and pushed on main as 5c5e4b1b8a4c. Dispatch now presents Swap Agent as one explicit global replacement control, the per-step pool editors point users back to that shared Dispatch control for all-step changes, and the layout regression test locks that framing in place. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
